title: ChicagoChaseEvent
description: Chicago Chase Runtime Event Schema v2.0. Arc-first architecture. Phase is a projection derived from event_type, not an authority label. phase_hint is advisory only — triage ignores it for classification and may override.

event_id.description: Unique immutable identifier. Format: runId:eventIndex or UUID. Must never be reused.

run_id.description: Groups events into one 10-15 min session. Format: run_YYYY_MM_DD_NN

timestamp.description: Monotonic time within run (ms or s). Must be strictly non-decreasing.

phase_hint.description: Advisory projection of phase at emission time. E=Escalation, A=Adaptation, R=Resolution, NULL=non-phase noise. NOT authoritative — triage derives true phase from event_type. Causality overrides this field when they disagree.

event_type.description: Canonical event taxonomy. Primary phase classifier — event_type determines true E/A/R membership, not phase_hint.

source_system.description: Causal attribution anchor. Where the event originates.

zone_id.description: Human-recognizable zone identifier. Supports landmark recall metric.

tags.description: Analysis descriptors for breakpoint classification. NOT causal.

payload.description: Event-specific structured data. heat_delta, speed, damage, etc.

causal_links.description: Enables arc formation via causal clustering. Arcs are contiguous causal clusters — this field is the connective tissue. A events without a causal link to a prior E are demoted to decorative. Causality overrides phase_hint when they disagree.

triggered_by.description: event_ids that caused this event. Primary arc membership signal.

contributes_to.description: event_ids this event will influence. Used for forward arc clustering.
